message:
🔧 ci: Add manual trigger to AI Fix workflow

Allows testing the workflow via workflow_dispatch

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -3,6 +3,12 @@ name: AI Fix with Claude Code
 on:
   issues:
     types: [labeled]
+  workflow_dispatch:
+    inputs:
+      issue_number:
+        description: 'Issue number to fix'
+        required: true
+        type: number
 
 permissions:
   contents: write
